AI-Powered Secondhand Shopping

Stop scrolling.
Let AI find the deal.

ReFind searches Craigslist, Facebook Marketplace, and OfferUp in parallel, compares price and condition, and drafts seller messages from one chat interface.

Start Shopping See How It Works

Top Deal: IKEA Sectional — $120 (Fair)

Hoboken, NJ | 3.8 seller rating | Deal Score: 78/100

How It Works

1

Describe It

Type or speak what you want, including price, condition, and location.

2

Agents Search

Marketplace searches run in parallel so you get a broad secondhand snapshot fast.

3

Ranked Results

Deals are scored on value, condition, seller quality, and proximity before you decide.

Built Different

Voice & Text

Switch between speaking and typing without changing the workflow.

Parallel Search

Multiple agents search multiple marketplaces at the same time.

You Approve

Nothing gets sent to sellers unless you explicitly approve it.

Deal Scoring

0-100 scoring combines pricing, condition, seller, and distance.

Contact Agent

Draft negotiation messages and outreach without starting from scratch.

Smart Filtering

Use natural language instead of filling out rigid marketplace forms.

Powered By

Assistant UIDigitalOceanRailtracksWorkOSUnkeyAugment Code

Ready to find your next deal?

No credit card. No sign-up required in demo mode.
